content:
<@&1440133908661534790> 

Hey Everyone,  

As some of you are already aware, we have introduced a help bot to the server to assist with commands. Type a single command from the list below that is presently active, and "**Morimens Help Bot**" will automatically send a message.

+guides
+codes
+pyramid
+store
+lore
+prototype

Suggestions for additional commands are always welcome, please share them in <#1385040039448412170> channel or contact us <@575252669443211264>

We will keep and update all commands [HERE](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1436913827571695898/1452536257933476083) (Under the Pinned Section on the Bot Commands Channel).

**Please refrain from spamming slash commands in the server**. Just like regular text messages, excessive use of commands floods the channel, makes it difficult for other users to communicate, and can strain the bot's resources. Use them thoughtfully to maintain a positive and accessible environment for everyone. 

***CN commands could be arriving soon, just waiting for team confirmation.***

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

嘿大家，

正如部分用户已经了解到的，我们已在服务器上添加了一个帮助机器人来协助执行命令。请键入下方列表中当前可用的单个命令，**帮助机器人**将自动发送消息。

+guides
+codes
+pyramid
+store
+lore
+prototype

欢迎提出更多命令建议，请在 <#1385040039448412170> 频道分享，或联系我们 <@575252669443211264>。

我们将保留并更新所有命令[此处](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1436913827571695898/1452536257933476083)(在机器人命令频道的置顶部分下)。

**请勿在服务器内滥用斜杠命令**。就像普通短信一样，过度使用命令会使频道信息过载，妨碍其他用户交流，并可能消耗机器人的资源。请谨慎使用命令，以维护一个积极友好的交流环境。

***CN指令可能很快就会发布，正在等待团队确认。***
